name: Nexus Arm
tagline: Open source Universal Repository Manager (ARM version, community edition), default credentials: admin/admin123
description:
Open source Universal Repository Manager (ARM version, community edition), default credentials: admin/admin123

Docs: https://help.sonatype.com/en/sonatype-nexus-repository.html?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  nexus:
    image: sonatypecommunity/nexus3
    environment:
      - NEXUS_SECURITY_RANDOMPASSWORD=false
      - INSTALL4J_ADD_VM_PARAMS=-Xms2703m -Xmx2703m -XX:MaxDirectMemorySize=2703m -Djava.util.prefs.userRoot=/nexus-data/javaprefs
    volumes:
      - nexus_data:/nexus-data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://localhost:8081/service/rest/v1/status
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 60s
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42077:8081
volumes:
  nexus_data: null
